title: leucanthemum atratum
intro: Leucanthemum atratum, also known as the oxeye daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Leucanthemum atratum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural remedy enthusiasts.
